reviewTexts: friendly service. waffle with chocolate icecream and nutella is the best.
Awesome neighborhood place to take the kids. Consistently great waffles!
Amazing food amazing place amazing service
These are absolutely delicious. Must stop.

best waffles ive ever had and the best ice cream in the city. they sell by the pint if you order ahead. super friendly staff and family friendly environment.

i really enjoy the philosophy "trust the process", its simple and elegant. also a great walking date stop on a cold day. we can pop in, grab a sugar waffle and eat it piping hot while walking. the milkshakes are absolutely delectable too during summer, especially the cookie butter one. 5 stars all day

These were honestly, unexpectedly amazing. The place has both waffles and ice cream, as well as a few other items and different combinations of the two. I decided to get the Antwerp with Nutella ice cream.

It was just stellar. The waffles here are not the typical soggy grocery store ones. No, they are made in house and are liege waffles. So, more chewy and sugary with bits of crunch at the edges.

The ice cream is also so so good. Super creamy. A pretty nice amount of Nutella flavor (could always be stronger though). Just really good and a really fair portion. When the two are paired together, it’s just exquisite.

keywordPhrases.exampleQuote: best waffles ive ever had and the best ice cream in the city.
